sentences.arabic: رَأَى سُلَيْمَانُ آثَارَ أَقْدَامٍ صَغِيرَةً عَلَى الثَّلْجِ.
sentences.translation: Sulejman je vidio male tragove stopala na snijegu.
sentences.translationEn: Sulayman saw small footprints in the snow.
The prints were leading to the window.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ سِنْجَابًا صَغِيرًا يَجْلِسُ عَلَى حَافَّةِ الشُّبَّاكِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je malog vjevericu koja sjedi na ivici prozora.
sentences.translationEn: He found a small squirrel sitting on the edge of the window.

sentences.translation: Dao mu je malo orašastih plodova i pustio ga da ode.
sentences.translationEn: He gave it some nuts and let it go.
